---
title: "Cordelia Anne Margaret Yonge"
---

## Cordelia Anne Margaret Yonge

**Dates:** (1864- 14 December 1865)

### Description

niece of CMY

### Biography

She died of whooping cough aged 16 months. [<i>Pall Mall Gazette</i> 16 December 1865]

### Letters

- Letter from May 3d 1888
- Letter from Holy Innocents [28? December], 1865.
- Letter from Decr 22d [1865]	
- Letter from Decr 17th [1865]
- Letter from Decr 8th 1865

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
